PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE/PHX, AS SUBROGEE OF ITS INSURED, JOSEPH SANDERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, KELLY LEUNG, WENDY THAT PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE/PHX AS SUBROGEE OF ITS INSURED, JOSEPH SANDERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS KELLY LEUNG AND WENDY LEUNG THE SUM OF $16,364.00, EXCEPT THAT THE LIABILITY OF WENDY LEUNG SHALL NOT EXCEED THE SUM OF $15,000.00 AS SHE IS THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE INVOLVED VEHICLE.
